name: vibetix-server
description: Firebase Cloud Functions backend for VibeTix WebAdmin

scripts.serve: npm run build && firebase emulators:start --only functions --config ../firebase.json --project mobile-61a6c
scripts.shell: npm run build && firebase functions:shell --config ../firebase.json --project mobile-61a6c
scripts.deploy: npm run build && firebase deploy --only functions --config ../firebase.json --project mobile-61a6c
